question: Which Mystery movies have reviews approving of the ending or a plot twist?
semantic_question: Does the review approve of the ending, finale, resolution, or plot twist?
suql_query: SELECT movie_id, title, year, runtime, director, genres FROM movies WHERE genres LIKE '%Mystery%' AND answer(review, 'Does the review approve of the ending, finale, resolution, or plot twist?') = 'Yes';
annotation_policy: Deterministic lexical annotation; no evaluated LLM used
